mapper.select: SELECT /* @SUB07-03_1#Sql001 */ A.M_F_CODE AS FUND_CODE ,A.M_F_TYPE AS FUND_TYPE ,A.M_F_NAME AS FUND_NAME ,A.M_F_ITAKU_CMP AS FUND_ITAKU_CMP ,A.M_F_KAISU AS FUND_KAISU ,A.M_F_GO AS FUND_GO ,A.M_F_MD_BUY_KUBUN AS FUND_MD_BUY_KUBUN ,B.FAMILY_NAME AS FAMILY_NAME FROM ETRADE.FUND@CORDYS_ET10.WORLD A INNER JOIN ETRADE.ITAKU@CORDYS_ET10.WORLD B ON A.M_F_ITAKU_CMP = B.FAMILY_CD WHERE A.M_F_TYPE IN ('1', '2') AND A.M_F_DELFLG = '0' AND A.M_F_ET_START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND (UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE(UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE(A.M_F_NAME)), 'KANA_FWKATAKANA') LIKE '%' || UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE(UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE((#{req.keyWordSearch}))), 'KANA_FWKATAKANA') || '%' OR UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE(UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE(B.FAMILY_NAME)), 'KANA_FWKATAKANA') LIKE '%' || UTL_I18N.TRANSLITERATE(UPPER(TO_MULTI_BYTE((#{req.keyWordSearch}))), 'KANA_FWKATAKANA') || '%' ) ORDER BY B.FAMILY_NAME ,A.M_F_NAME ,A.M_F_TYPE
